data.title: Kyrgyz Republic State Investment Agency and CZ sign a memorandum of understanding
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The National Investment Agency of the Kyrgyz Republic has signed a memorandum of understanding with Binance Co-founder CZ. The two parties will cooperate to develop the cryptocurrency and blockchain technology ecosystem in the Kyrgyz Republic, including providing infrastructure, technical support, technical expertise and consulting services for cryptocurrency and blockchain technology, as well as implementing educational programs. CZ said that it is currently providing formal and informal advice to some government agencies to help them develop cryptocurrency regulatory frameworks and blockchain solutions, improve government efficiency, and expand blockchain to areas beyond transactions. This work is very meaningful.

data.title: A whale bought 6488.5 ETH at $1772 during the market decline
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale spent 11.5 million USDC to buy 6488.5 ETH at a price of US$1,772 during the previous market decline.

data.title: Ethereum Privacy Pool Processes 238 Transactions Since Launch
data.description: According to PANews, the Ethereum privacy pool developed by 0xbow has processed 238 transactions totaling 67.49 ETH since its launch on April 1. The protocol utilizes zero-knowledge proofs to ensure privacy while screening for illegal funds to maintain compliance. The core contract is structured in three layers: asset management, zero-knowledge privacy, and compliance review. Vitalik Buterin is among the first users to deposit into the pool. Currently, the deposit limit per transaction ranges from 0.1 to 1 ETH.

data.title: A whale withdrew 460 BTC worth $37.7 million from Binance after a year of silence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale withdrew 460 BTC worth 37.7 million US dollars from Binance 2 hours ago after being silent for 1 year.

data.title: Coinbase International will launch NIL, VINE, GUN and EDGE perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase International Station announced that Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced will launch Nillion, Vine, GUNZ and Definitive perpetual contracts. NIL-PERP, VINE-PERP, GUN-PERP and EDGE-PERP markets will be opened on or after 9:30 am (UTC time) on April 10, 2025.

data.title: Ethereum Sees Institutional Growth Amid Resurgence in Demand
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH), which has recently seen weak price performance and ongoing retracement with little bullish momentum, is now drawing renewed interest from major institutions. This Ethereum news has set out to push bearishness in the market.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/03/ethereum-news-sees-institutional-growth-amid-resurgence-in-demand/

data.title: Fitch Warns of Potential U.S. Economic Slowdown Due to Tariff Increases
data.description: According to Odaily, Fitch Ratings has indicated that the U.S. economy might experience slower growth in 2025 than the previously forecasted 1.7% in March, due to higher-than-expected tariffs. The increase in tariffs is expected to lead to higher consumer prices and reduced corporate profits in the United States. The recent tariff adjustments have returned U.S. tariff rates to levels last seen in 1909, exerting upward pressure on goods prices. This situation may cause the Federal Reserve to adopt a more cautious approach regarding further interest rate cuts in the near term. Additionally, the tariff hikes could place downward pressure on the ratings of some sovereign nations with high export value-added levels.
